sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107587" key="u(peria/xw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπεριάχω</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <sense id="n107587.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shout above, out-shout,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">αὐλῶν</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.305</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
